programmes.show_description: Violent crime thriller with Nicolas Cage. When his brother falls foul of a ruthless mobster, a straight-laced man must go against the odds to save him with the help of an old friend. (2017)
Crime thriller with Curtis '50 Cent' Jackson. A cop infiltrates the inner circle of a notorious gun runner, but finds himself in danger when a botched deal leaves the crook paranoid. (2010)
Western adventure with Kenny Rogers. After losing his job, a former rodeo champion leaves his home in Texas behind for a job herding mustangs in Wyoming. (1985)
Welcome to LEGEND XTRA - your home for movies and series full of action, adventure, suspense and much more!
